debug_info.goal:
P : Erdos392.Params
p : ℕ
hp : p ≤ Erdos392.Params.L P
⊢ ↑(Erdos392.Factorization.balance (Erdos392.Params.n P) (Erdos392.Params.initial P) p) ≥
    -↑(Erdos392.Params.M P) * Real.log ↑(Erdos392.Params.n P) -
      ↑(Erdos392.Params.M P) * ↑(Erdos392.Params.L P) ^ 2 * ↑(primeCounting (Erdos392.Params.n P))

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have : P.initial.balance p ≥ - P.M * (Real.log P.n) := by
    by_cases hpL : p > P.L
    · exact (P.initial.balance_small_prime_ge (p := p) (hp := (le_trans hp (by
        have : (P.L : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by
          have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.n)
          have : (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 ≤ P.n := by
            have : P.L * P.L < P.n := P.hL
            exact_mod_cast (le_of_lt this)
          simpa [sq] using (le_sqrt_of_sq_le hn_pos this)
        exact hn_pos ▸ hpL.le.trans this)) (hp' := hpL))
    · have : P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        by_cases hps : (p : ℕ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n
        · have : ¬ (p : ℕ) > P.L := by exact hpL
          exact (P.initial.balance_small_prime_ge (p := p) (hp := hps) (hp' := lt_of_le_of_ne hp
            (Ne.symm (ne_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_ne hp (Ne.symm (ne_of_lt (lt_of_not_ge hpL))))))))
        · have : P.initial.balance p ≥ -(P.n / p) := P.initial.balance_large_prime_ge (p := p) (by
            have : p > P.n / P.L := by
              have : p > P.n / P.L ∨ p ≤ P.n / P.L := lt_or_ge p (P.n / P.L)
              exact this.elim id (fun hle => (not_le.mp hps) (by
                have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := by
                  have : (0 : ℕ) < P.n := lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le
                  exact_mod_cast this
                have hL_lt_sqrt : (P.L : ℝ) < Real.sqrt P.n := by
                  rw [Real.lt_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)]; exact_mod_cast by nlinarith [P.hL]
                have : (p : ℝ) ≤ (P.n / P.L : ℕ) := by exact_mod_cast hle
                have : (p : ℝ) < Real.sqrt P.n := by
                  have hfloor : (P.n / P.L : ℝ) < Real.sqrt P.n := by
                    have hL_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.L := by exact_mod_cast P.hL_pos
                    have : (P.n : ℝ) / P.L < Real.sqrt P.n := by
                      rw [div_lt_iff₀ hL_pos]
                      nlinarith [hL_lt_sqrt]
                    have : (P.n / P.L : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) / P.L := by
                      exact_mod_cast Nat.cast_le.mpr (Nat.le_div_self _ _)
                    exact lt_of_le_of_lt this ‹_›
                  exact lt_of_le_of_lt this hfloor
                exact this.le))
            exact this)
          have : -(P.n / p : ℤ) ≥ - (P.M : ℤ) * (Real.log P.n) := by
            have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by positivity
            have : (-(P.n / p : ℤ) : ℝ) ≥ - (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
              have : (-(P.n / p : ℤ) : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by positivity
              linarith
            exact_mod_cast this
          exact le_trans (by exact_mod_cast this) (by exact_mod_cast ‹_›)
      exact this
  have hnonpos : (-(↑(Erdos392.Params.M P) : ℝ) * Real.log ↑(Erdos392.Params.n P) -
        (↑(Erdos392.Params.M P) : ℝ) * ↑(Erdos392.Params.L P) ^ 2 *
          (↑(primeCounting (Erdos392.Params.n P)) : ℝ)) ≤

    have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (↑(Erdos392.Params.M P) : ℝ) * ↑(Erdos392.Params.L P) ^ 2 *

    linarith
  exact le_trans hnonpos this
